value.found_quote:
### Require plan approval for teammates

For complex or risky tasks, you can require teammates to plan before implementing. The teammate works in read-only plan mode until the lead approves their approach:
value.rationale: The page has a dedicated section "Require plan approval for teammates" describing read-only plan mode until the lead approves, matching the claim. Agent teams overall are described as experimental and disabled by default, so the feature is in a preview/experimental stage.
